en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO THE SHEMINITH. A PSALM OF DAVID. Save, O LORD, for the godly one is gone; for the faithful have vanished from among the children of man.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你施行拯救，因為虔誠人沒有了， 在世人中的信實人也不見了。

en: Everyone utters lies to his neighbor; with flattering lips and a double heart they speak.
zh: 他們彼此說謊， 用諂媚的嘴唇說話，口是心非。

en: May the LORD cut off all flattering lips, the tongue that makes great boasts,
zh: 願耶和華剪除一切說諂媚話的嘴唇， 和說誇大話的舌頭。

en: those who say, "With our tongue we will prevail, our lips are with us; who is master over us?"
zh: 他們曾說：“我們必能以舌頭取勝； 我們的嘴唇是自己的，誰能作我們的主呢？”

en: "Because the poor are plundered, because the needy groan, I will now arise," says the LORD; "I will place him in the safety for which he longs."
zh: 耶和華說：“因為困苦人的冤屈和貧窮人的歎息， 我現在要起來，把他們安置在他們渴望的穩妥之中。”

en: The words of the LORD are pure words, like silver refined in a furnace on the ground, purified seven times.
zh: 耶和華的言語是純淨的言語， 好像銀子在泥爐中煉過，精煉過七次一樣。

en: You, O LORD, will keep them; you will guard us from this generation forever.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你保守我們， 保護我們 永遠脫離這世代的人。

en: On every side the wicked prowl, as vileness is exalted among the children of man.
zh: 惡人到處橫行， 邪惡在世人中被高舉。
